lines.text: Huh? Is that your first reaction? Come on!
Anyway! You know, we could really use your help with this ongoing case!
Here's the thing, we could really use your help with this ongoing case...
We've been getting a lot of missing persons reports recently.
Nobody ever saw those people assaulted or anything, they just vanished.
Some of those people are even Resonators or they've served in the military!
Since you're always coming and going from the city, can you help me watch out for anything weird or suspicious?
Thank you so much! Knew I could count on you!
Ring me up when you spot anything sus, yeah? Laterz!
Hey! Who the hell are you? Let {Male=him;Female=her} go!
Whoa! You-You... Don't move!
Ugh, fine... Lower your weapons guys!
So that's what the Séance Society was up to... Thanks for your statement, it really helped!
Somehow the Fractsidus was involved too! Who could have thought… Luckily you were there to stop them in time!
The man's still not saying anything... Guess we'll have to keep him under custody for now.
Nothing about that suspect lady either. We still have zero info on her.
Most of those Resonators have varying degrees of Overclocking. They need urgent care, the professionals from Huaxu Academy are already on it.
A guy named Lirong had it worst, didn't wake up from his coma until yesterday.
He's still recovering from some really bad aftereffects, but at least he's making progress.
Oh, so the missing cases led to an illegal cult-like organization AND a bunch of other twisted plans!
Unbelievable... We'd be toast without your help.
Huh? And who's that?
What? Come on, you need to be more specific… Whoever they are, sounds like they'll make for quite the Patroller.
Well, that's it for now. Ring me up when you find something unusual again. I'll catch you later!
There you are, Rover!
It's just Baizhi being Baizhi. She's a little awkward with showing care, but I think it's cute!
Anyway! Rover, quick, tell us what happened!
The Fractsidus again? Ugh, those jerks!
Connection? ...No idea, but I did hear General Jiyan used to be a military doctor...
Woah. First time hearing about all that...
Uhhh... Maybe the Sentinel had its own special ways of picking candidates?
Yeah, true. Wouldn't be surprised if Jué decided to make me the Magistrate one day, not gonna lie!
Seriously, Lord Jué knows how to choose 'em. Our previous Magistrates were all top-notch at running the show.
And Madam Jinhsi? She's already made this city a well-oiled machine in no time.
I'd have a mental Overclock just trying to keep up with all that paperwork... She was made for this!
Uh, what is that saying again? Real gold never loses its shine!
The Norfall Barrens?! It's been a battlefield since ancient times...
The Black Shores? Doesn't ring a bell... Sounds like the name of a place, but I've never seen it on any map.
Since it's about flowers... We should go ask Grandma Lin!
Hehe... You're making me blush a little.
Grandma Lin loves listening to storytellers. I think I saw her earlier... Let's go look for her.
Hi, Verina! I'm Chixia, this is Yangyang, and {Male=he;Female=she}'s Rover! Grandma Lin told us we should come find you!
Wow, you really know your stuff! I learned a lot from that!
Gosh, help us out, someone! We don't know what kind of flower it is, and we haven't seen anyone wearing it either...
Speaking of that... How does it even work? If I wore this flower on me right now, do I automatically become one of them?
Uhhh... Yeah? I was just saying if I wore this flower, would they immediately see me as one of their own...
Ohh, I see... but how do we get our hands on one?
Rover, did you find them?
What? Seriously? No way...
No way, are they really from the Black Shores?
Tsk... Not as mysterious as people make 'em out to be. Well at least they're good at running, I'll give them that.
Don't worry, Yangyang. We all know how strong our Rover is!
Just ring us whenever you need a hand! We'll come rushing!
Rover, perfect timing! This guy's been sniffin' around here for a while now. He keeps trying to talk to the elderly and minors! I've been keeping an eye on him!
And I saw a little girl with him! She kept turning her head and looking around, but now she's nowhere to be found. This is super fishy!
Hey, I'm Patroller Chixia. Sir, business license, please.
I see. So, no license. I bet you don't have a fixed business location either, huh?
Hmph, now show me your Organizational Accreditation, please.
No license, no clear business plan... You're running an illegal business, then...
Who's your supervisor? You should at least have their ID number?
So do you even have a supervisor or not?
Yeah, yeah! I believe you! I know what's going on!
Now, sir, you're coming with me to the Patroller Station!
You really think I'm gonna buy that?
Back off! Leave that girl alone!
Hello, little one. Is your name Encore? Do you know this person?
We've got your back, little one! No worries! Just tell us what you know!
Cough cough... Wait!
No way? That's amazing, seriously! It looks exactly like the flower in that picture!
It's friggin amazing! Could you do that again? Please! I love it!
Hey there, Rover! Remember Grandpa Jingzhu?
Yep, the one who said that “my-unwavering-love” thing.
The one who said that "my-unwavering-love" thing. Ringing any bells now?
So, I ran into him earlier, and he needs our help in snagging Echoes again. Hence, the call.
Awesome! We’ll catch you near the training grounds, then.
That’s fine. Swing by the training grounds when you’ve got a sec.
Nailed it! {PlayerName}, you’re really mastering this!
We did find some Tuners! I gotta admit, I was kinda wondering why you seemed so at ease out in the wild.
But now that I know you used to be a Midnight Ranger, it totally clicks!
Yep! The more eyes we have, the faster we can track down Grandma Linghan.
But where on earth could Grandma Linghan have gone...?
A cave, you say? Tacet Discords love hanging out in places like that. Let’s hurry and check it out!
This place is huge! How on earth are we going to find her? Ugh, it's so frustrating!
Yep! The gourd just got upgraded with a search function. Let’s see if we can use it to spot any nearby Tacet Discords.

Don’t worry, {PlayerName}, it’s pretty straightforward. Normally, I’d give you time to figure it out yourself, but with Grandma Linghan missing, we can’t afford to waste any. Let me walk you through it.
You got it! I’ll be your guide through this.
You can call me Chixia... And, she's Yangyang!
Baizhi didn't tell us you'd have these aftereffects when you wake up.
That means it's probably gonna get dangerous here soon.

Ugh, I knew it. Our <ano=Terminals>gourds</ano> are out of service because of the <color=Highlight>Etheric Sea's</color> influence. We can't send or receive messages for help now. We better hurry over to meet up with Baizhi at our gathering spot and get outta here.
Guess you really can't recall a thing, but don't worry!
If you got any questions, we can talk as we move. Yangyang and I will give you the full scoop, every little detail, from the get-go!
Oh, that's great! Let's go together!
Yeah, let's get going!
Once we're outta the gorge, there's only a short walk to reach Jinzhou!
Jinzhou is the safest place round here. The Resonance Nexus provides coverage for the whole city. Besides, we've got a protective barrier and strong fortifications!
Hehe, right?
Hehe, maybe it's not as big as some other cities. BUT! Jinzhou is always the best place in my heart!
Huh? We've agreed to meet up with Baizhi here... Where is she?
...A Tacet Field?
...When did it show up?
It wasn't here when we just got here.
So it appeared while we weren't looking? Like, in the blink of an eye?
Or maybe the Etheric Sea can tell where we are? Could it be following us?
Isn't that Baizhi?!
Baizhi!
BAIZHI!
We agreed to meet up 'round here, and she said she was off to collect some samples. Gosh, did she really go straight into the heart of a Tacet Field for that?!
Accordin' to the <ano=Popular Shows in Jinzhou>Hero Plays</ano>, yes! There's a chance for that!
True, who could've set the bait, then?
Oh, I see... the one who seems simple-minded in the group is actually the mastermind with schemes. That's another popular trope!
No, wait... I'm not the mastermind!
Oh, I see... the one who seems gentle and quiet is actually the villain, hiding right under the protagonist's nose. That's a common trope, too!
No, wait... Yangyang isn't the villain!
What?!
Baizhi!
Baizhi! We're in a Dormant Tacet Field, right? Why did you come here by yourself?
Baizhi, you know, we... huh?
You know, {Male=he;Female=she} was super energetic! Handled a super big TD! Way more spirited than me!
Yangyang! Rover!
Are you alright? Are you hurt?
Ugh thank goodness! We could see that darn barrier, but couldn't lay a finger on it!
Rover, what was that last move called? That looked as cool as Fiamma's killer move!
Aww c'mon, stop being modest! So you didn't even go all out earlier. I saw how you took down that fella with both of my eyes!
You made a couple kicks and that thing vanished into thin air!
Anyway, come check this out!
Wow! An Echo of the Elite Class... Someone got lucky today!
Oh, by Pangu Terminal, she means the gourd-shaped device every Resonator has, developed by researchers in Huanglong!
But you see, it's not always we get to find these. Also, there's a limit to what your gourd can absorb.
No need for that! Rover, why don't you just try absorbing it with your Terminal?
...Oh. So it doesn't work.
No worries! You can start with smaller ones before tackling this guy here.
There should be some sweet Baby Roseshrooms 'round here. Let's go check those out, shall we?
What... What kinda power is that!
Rover, you...
You been playin' the fool all along?
I've never seen a Resonance Ability quite like this. You got any other tricks up your sleeve? Like, eating a whole Tacet Discord? Grilling Echoes alive?
Wasn't it your Resonance Ability?
Indeed. So what would a Tacet Discord taste like? Spicy? Sweet?
I heard some folks tried to cook Gulpuffs, and they even made it a local speciality, didn't they?
Speaking of which, Gulpuff's a type of Tacet Discord, too!
I'm even more curious now... Anyway, spicy food is always the best!
There was a very strong person way back. Like they held the whole universe right in their hands. As there was no Terminal in those days, they absorbed the Tacet Discords with their bare hands!
and the TD they absorbed was the most powerful of all. That person turned it into the first Echo ever.
Then they used the power of that Echo to rebuild the world, sort out the laws, and that's how the history of Huanglong began...
Actually... I'm not, I hope I was though. That was just some old tales my parents used to tell me, kinda like the Sentinel's Appointment thing.
Yangyang's got an impressive memory for the ancient texts. Me? I just happen to roughly remember what the story's about.
Please, Yangyang, stop reciting that! I'm beggin' you!
Oh my, it's takin' me back to my school days, when I had to recite pages and pages of them... Anyway, that's just a made-up legend, isn't it?

Come on, that was eons ago. Us Resonators do live a little longer, but we're still looking at 'bout a hundred years or so. And the known history of Huanglong stretches back at least a thousand years...
Whether it's true or not, that story happened a long time ago when Jinzhou didn't even exist.
Could it be that Rover's like, the great-great-great-great-great-{Male=granddaddy;Female=granny} of us all?
There’s still some distance to the Huaxu Academy. Let’s see who reaches there faster!
Ugh... Please tell me this is the last one!
Rover, your moves are sharp as always. Dealing with so many TDs seems like a walk in the park for you.
Rover, Yangyang, I'll be keepin' the city safe as a Patroller. Do come back in one piece, okay?
Thanks! I'll give it my all!
Rover! I said don't call me that... Nevermind, we don't have time for this.
Wow, thanks, Rover! Can't believe you still remember that title! I'll live up to it for sure!
Rest assured. You can count on me!
Rover, Yangyang, safe travels!
May victory prevail the lasting night!
It's a pre-recorded broadcast message. Our Magistrate saw this coming, and she had General Jiyan devise an emergency plan a long time ago.
This wave of TD attacks should be over now.
We knew this was coming and we were ready, but oh boy, the amount of TDs is insane.
Thanks for coming in time, Rover. It would've taken us much longer to handle this.
Oh, Director Taoqi is here too. For a better run down of the situation, you can find her near the city gate!

Rover, it’s a <color=Highlight>Sonance Casket</color>! Hmm... Hang on to it. I know this old acquaintance who’s a <color=Highlight>relic merchant</color>. He knows a lot about stuff like this. I’ll take you to him when we get to Jinzhou.
Hmm? {PlayerName}? Hey! {PlayerName}!
What brings you here? It's been ages since we last met! The Patrol Station's been pretty busy lately, so I haven't had the time to catch up with you.
And Zhezhi's here too! Hiya! Do you remember me? We met at the Moon-Chasing Festival.
Oh? Are you alright? You don't look well... Do you need help?
The painting we had you do for us during the festival is awesome! Everyone loves it, so we put it up on the wall!
We'd also like to invite you to our station, so we can formally thank you in person!
Wait, how bout' coming to the station with me today? Are you heading back to the city?
Oh, is this not a good time?
Investigate? About what? A new case?
Oh, I get it! In that case, it's probably not the best time for a get-together.
That's okay! Just tell me if you need any help!
I'm here to support the Patrollers. There was an assault near the mine recently, and they're short on people to investigate.
What's odd is those monsters haven't caused any more trouble since we got here. Right now, we're talking to witnesses and trying to figure out what triggered the incident.
Don't tell me it's a Tacet Discord... Hold on, just got a message... Seems like they really are stirring up trouble again. Sorry, but I gotta go check this out!
Hey ya! Long time no see, {PlayerName}. How’s it going?
Well, just calling to see what you're up to. Are you free now?
No worries at all! It’s no biggie, really. Well, not as huge as diving into those tokens, that’s for sure.
Remember my promise? About treating you to a nice meal? Well, since I’ve got a few days off and figured you’d be around, now’s the perfect time to cash in on that promise and invite you out.
So, what do you say? How about this Jinzhou Speedster takes you on a culinary adventure at Auntie Panhua’s Restaurant?
The Maocai she cooks is an explosion of spice and flavor! One gulp and you’ll feel the buzz in your bones!

You know, that’s what I like. But hey, no pressure if spicy isn’t your thing. Auntie Panhua’s a culinary genius, whipping up many treats like Poached Chicken, Rising Loong... you name it! It’s all authentic Jinzhou cuisine!
Didn’t expect you to be a foodie too. Next time I’m on patrol and find something tasty, I’ll make sure you get a taste.
So, we’re on for a date, right?
Let’s meet at Panhua’s Restaurant on Gourmet Street. Time-wise, just let me know before you’re ready.
I’ll be eagerly waiting to hear from you!
Hey there, Rover! Finally found you! Hope I didn’t keep you waiting!
Ah, my bad! Let’s not dilly-dally any longer. Trust me, once we munch, you won’t wanna stop!
Aw, you’re too kind, but eating always comes first! Let’s dive straight into ordering and kick-start this feast!
No, no, no, Auntie Panhua, just forget that name! I’m begging you!
Yeah, exactly! Meet Rover, my awesome new friend! Today’s treat’s on me, so I brought {Male=him;Female=her} here to experience your culinary magic.

Hmm... The Candied Caltrops is fresh with just the right sweetness; the Poached Chicken sauce is Auntie Panhua’s original, unmatched anywhere else. Oh, and the Jinzhou Stew! It’s something you can only find here. I bet you’ve never tasted anything like it! Trust me, you don’t wanna miss out on this!
I’ve decided. Let’s get all of them.
We Patrollers don’t get paid a lot, but I love treating my friend to a feast once in a while. It’s just one meal, I won’t go broke!
To cater to all appetites, Auntie Panhua’s rolled out a small portion menu. Same fantastic flavors, just less food waste. So, no need to fret about over-ordering!
Rover, you enjoying the meal?
You got it! Next time, we’ll bring Yangyang and Baizhi along. Food’s always better with more pals, right? But what should we get then?
That’s all? Seriously? Not even Auntie Panhua’s culinary magic can shake you?
Something special? Hmm, give me some time to think.
Essence Medley Soup? What’s that?
Even though I just polished off my plate, there’s always room for soup in my second stomach. Rover, fancy trying it out? Auntie Panhua, can you whip it up for us?
Whoa, did you hear that? Brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients! My taste buds are tingling already... Rover, fancy trying it out? Auntie Panhua, can you whip it up for us?
Speaking of peculiar ingredients, it does remind me of someone...
Well… it’s Uncle Mahe!
Auntie Panhua! You’ve got the sweetest heart. I always knew it!
Yeah... Hold up! Rover, what’s that supposed to mean? Obviously, I...
Seriously, don’t you have work to do? Who keeps tabs on this stuff anyway!
Alright, let’s cut to the chase. {PlayerName} and I are here to get you to check out this recipe Auntie Panhua handed us.
Really? C’mon, wrack your brain for it! Uncle Mahe thinks it’s more of a medicinal cuisine than a regular dish.
Are you for real right now? My reputation as the Jinzhou Speedster is...
I-I had no other choice! How can I remember all those safety rules when there are bad guys coming at me? They’d only slow me down... Okay, okay, next time, I’ll watch out!
Just let Auntie Panhua know. It should be cool for you to join in!
But there's still one last piece of the puzzle to crack: the golden-handled spoon. If we whip up the soup without figuring out what that is about, the flavor might not hit the mark, right?
Seriously? No way! Who’d have guessed that!
Oops, looks like I gotta step down from my role as the Jinzhou encyclopedia. I’ve never even heard of that pyrite spoon!
We’ve covered more ground from Gourmet Street to here. Bet you haven’t had many city strolls like this before, huh?
Even though it’s a bit of a trek, I’m thrilled to show you around my hometown. We’re nearing the Main Street, where things get even more interesting.
...Aw, please don’t call me Xiaofang! It’s Chixia!
Oh no, I'm doomed. It seems everyone knows my other name now.
Cool, cool. Let’s get to business then.
{PlayerName}, you too?! No, please no... Let’s keep that name between us, alright?
Anyway, we're here to help Auntie Panhua recreate the Essence Medley Soup.
The recipe says we need to stir it with a golden-handled spoon once it starts bubbling. And Koko mentioned you happen to have a pyrite spoon with that exact name, right?
No wonder Auntie Panhua said it’s passed down through word of mouth, sparking debates over its flavor.
Seems like this recipe is more of a shopping list than a detailed guide.
Absolutely! Every household pulled out their secret stash of ingredients to brew up this soup. It’s gotta be divine.
Even if it doesn’t require any fancy cooking techniques, those good reviews can’t be bogus, right? Just like Auntie Panhua said, it’s brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients...
Now I’m even more eager to get a taste, knowing the backstory! Uncle Wei, mind lending us your big pyrite spoon?
That makes sense... By the way, doesn’t Auntie Panhua already have one on standby?
Since we’re here, might as well make the most of it. Can you lend a hand and check out my friend’s weapon?
Check it out. That’s Uncle Wei’s weapon shop right over there.
He’s the top-notch weapon maker in Jinzhou! If you have any weapon-related questions, just go ask him.
How’s your weapon maintenance? Once we figure out what that big spoon deal is, you can ask him to check it for you!
And here we are. This is the <color=Highlight>Synthesizer</color> Uncle Wei mentioned.

Aside from crafting materials and beefing up their quality, you can also whip up some basic potions here. It’s like a one-stop shop for all your needs, whether you’re kicking it in the city or out on an adventure.
I’ve got some synthesis materials right here. Go ahead, give it a try.
It might seem a bit tricky just hearing about it, but once you try it hands-on, you’ll get the hang of it real quick.
Wow, can you believe we’ve covered almost half of Jinzhou in just one day?
Tiring, but so worth it! I’m usually tied up with patrols, so catching up with so many friends all at once like this is a total first for me.

Introducing you to everyone, shooting the breeze... It’s like reconnecting with old friends all over again. Wait, didn’t I promise to treat you to a meal? How did it end up with you being my tour buddy instead?
But hey, thanks to you, I finally get why folks rave about the Essence Medley Soup as they do.
Brewed from the finest Jinzhou ingredients, with every essence distilled into a single bowl... The real treasure lies in everyone’s willingness to share their most prized grub, don’t you think?

Exactly! If we were back in wartime, Auntie Panhua reminding me to eat on time, Uncle Mahe caring about my work, Koko fretting over my safety, Uncle Wei dropping knowledge bombs on me, and all the other folks in Jinzhou...
They’d all without a doubt open up their pantries and share their most cherished grub with us.
As for me, I wanna be someone who can protect every single soul in Jinzhou... including you! I wanna keep you safe too! I’ve had a great time hanging out with you.
So, while we’re in Jinzhou, let me shoulder your worries and troubles, alright?
You can bet on this Jinzhou Speedster’s determination!
Yeah, no way Baizhi talks like that. She's more of a data dump kind of person. "Super duper cool"? Nah, too extra for her.
Seems like you're trying to boost your ego a bit!
Yeah, makes sense! Now we just gotta figure out where it came from. Who knows, we may find other cool Echoes in that place!
Well, both General Jiyan and Baizhi have confirmed it. No way they're lying.
I'll admit, the thought of someone else having an Echo inside them sounds pretty crazy to me. But with you, anything's possible.
You can absorb Reverberations with just your hands, like the legend says. So maybe one day you just stumbled upon this little thing and soaked it up like a sponge. Sounds feasible, I guess?
Sooo...
Do you know where exactly {Male=he;Female=she} absorbed you?
Yeah. It happened before {Male=he;Female=she} lost all memories, so we have to ask you.
Sleeping? Seriously? It's been so long! All those happenings, all that fighting, and you didn't hear anything? Well that's... Your sleeping quality is really something.
Hmm, I thought you'd be really different from the usual ones we see. Turns out you share a lot in common.
So you probably don't know your denomination, or a nick name? No wonder everyone's been calling you the "little one"...
A name? Now?
That's true.
Let's see... You want a cool one... What about "Echo the Invincible"? What do you say?
Hey, it makes every difference in the world! "I am Echo the Invincible!" That's what a Hero Play character would say as their transformation call!
Or maybe... Since you can fly and you've got those long ears... why don’t you call yourself... "Righteous Raptor"? Or "Valor Hawk"? "Flying Fury"?
Why? I love it when people call me the Jinzhou Speedster. Doesn't that sound awesome?
What's wrong? What are you muttering about? Abra... what? Sounds like you're reading a spell.
Sure, we won't. Got it.
Well, that didn't work out. I was hoping we could get some answers from the little... I mean, from Abby, but now we're back at square one.

I really thought we could figure out where Abby came from. It might not lead us to other special Echoes, but it's at least a starting point to uncover {PlayerName}'s past. Then we'll have something to do before asking Madam Magistrate and our Sentinel about it again.
Why do you sound so unsure? Didn't you see it all with your own eyes?
Hmm… Abby, can you show us again? I'm super curious how you did that. Who knows, we might learn something.
Uh... What? Did something happen?
So... you didn't really do anything?
Yeah, it looks that way. You can't even hold your shape for very long yet...
You're so real for that, Abby.

Knew it. Nothing about {PlayerName}'s ever gonna be easy to figure out... Hmm. Maybe we should bring Baizhi, Mr. Xiangli Yao, and all the researchers in Jinzhou... No, in the entire Huanglong together. They'll do a nice and thorough examination on Abby, and then...
Our Sentinel protects every one of us. Of course it's cool!
But... why are you talking about food again. Didn't you just stuff your face? What? Is your stomach a black hole?
Oh, Yangyang! What's there to be shy about? If you want to see {PlayerName}, just tell {Male=him;Female=her}!
So, what have you been up to these past few days? Feelin' lonely without us around?
Wanna go see some fireworks? How about some Moon Shooting? With the festival just around the corner, there's a really cool spot we can take you to.
Yep, I caught them hanging lanterns all around City Hall. Every street and alley is gonna be glowing, I can't wait to see it all lit up!
And we’ve got special Jinzhou traditions you won’t find anywhere else.
Like Taoyuan Vale! Folks go there a few days before the festival to write their wishes onto paper, then hang them on branches or toss 'em into Moontree Lodge.
They say wishes made during these days are sure to come true. Works like a charm.
Wanna give it a go, {PlayerName}? All you gotta do is write down your wish, real simple! Yangyang, Baizhi and I are already here.
Great!
See you at Taoyuan Vale.
